boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not satisfy STD-IRI-089-P exact-match requirements. END-IRI-089 shows CE-12 pending and WARN-IRI-089 shows insurance-status verification remains open. No source confirms closed boundary before 2026-06-28 execution date.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P mandates insurance-status class verification as prerequisite for contractor site start. Source records contain warning (WARN-IRI-089) and pending endorsement (CE-12) but no confirmation of resolved insurance-status class.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Two critical blockers remain unresolved: (1) CE-12 carrier endorsement pending, (2) insurance-status class not verified per WARN-IRI-089. Both required by policy before work begins.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-IRI-089-P requires endorsement authority match on contractor, site, coverage type, start date, and insurance-status class. Insurance-status class verification is absent from source records; CE-12 remains pending. Execution boundary cannot close before 2026-06-28.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show CE-12 endorsement pending (END-IRI-089) and insurance-status class verification absent (WARN-IRI-089). STD-IRI-089-P requires authority match on contractor, site, coverage type, date, and status class before work begins. Boundary remains open; resolution required before 2026-06-28 execution.
open_blockers: Policy requirement unsatisfied before execution date
